reason: Acceptance criteria AC1-AC8 are the verification target. Definition of Done lists test layers and 'no behavior change' invariant.
Cross-layer data flow (incremental_rebuild → tag_store → tag_embedder → epa_basis), failure-handling expectations, and observability fields to verify.
Per-step validation commands and review gates list — each step's gate is a check item.
Schema final form (manual_tags, residuals with neighbor_count/computed_at) — checks must verify the implemented schema matches verbatim.
Atomic write contract (tmp + fsync + replace + fsync(dir)) and fcntl.flock semantics — implementation must satisfy these or AC7/AC8 fail under crash/concurrent scenarios.
Migration idempotency (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS), FK CASCADE handling, and connection lifecycle — checks must verify Phase 0 follows them.
Error shape consistency: tag embedding failure / EPA train failure must not bubble as 5xx; should land in task.impact_report fields.
pytest scope, lint, type-check are mandatory before declaring done. Defines the regression bar.
Verify new structured log fields are low-cardinality and don't leak high-cardinality data (tag names OK, query text NOT OK).
Verify Phase 0 changes are coherent across layers — schema migration, rebuild hook, tag_governance sync, manual delete cascade all align.
Verify no duplication of Embedder usage, SQLite connection patterns, or registry transaction conventions — checks must flag near-duplicates.
